records.ety: [F. survivre, L. supervivere; super over + vivere to live. See Super-, and Victuals.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Survived (?); p. pr. & vb. n. Surviving.]

defs: To live beyond the life or existence of; to live longer than; to outlive; to outlast; as, to survive a person or an event.
quotes: I'll assure her of Her widowhood, be it that she survive me, In all my lands and leases whatsoever.

defs: To remain alive; to continue to live.
quotes: Thy pleasure, Which, when no other enemy survives, Still conquers all the conquerors.
Alike are life and death, When life in death survives.
